description: 20-node Landis BN-RRM causal DAG with data-learned CPTs. Tier 1 (Noisy-OR) for contamination indices, Tier 2-3 (BDeu + expert blend) for bioavailability and effects, Tier 4 (expert-dominated) for ecological risk. Learned from 245 stations in bnrrm_training.db.
author: Data-learned (tiered CPTs from bnrrm_training.db)

nodes.label: Sediment Cu
nodes.description: Total copper in bulk sediment (N=151 stations in DB)

nodes.label: Sediment Zn
nodes.description: Total zinc in bulk sediment (N=133 stations in DB)

nodes.label: Sediment Pb
nodes.description: Total lead in bulk sediment (N=141 stations in DB)

nodes.label: Sediment Cd
nodes.description: Total cadmium in bulk sediment (N=140 stations in DB)

nodes.label: Sediment Hg
nodes.description: Total mercury in bulk sediment (N=133 stations in DB)

nodes.label: Sediment As
nodes.description: Total arsenic in bulk sediment (N=136 stations in DB)

nodes.label: Sediment Cr
nodes.description: Total chromium in bulk sediment (N=136 stations in DB)

nodes.label: Total PAHs
nodes.description: Sum of 16 priority PAH compounds (N=162 stations in DB)

nodes.label: Total PCBs
nodes.description: Total polychlorinated biphenyls (sparse data -- available at select sites)

nodes.label: TOC
nodes.description: Organic carbon content -- higher values reduce metal bioavailability (N=31 stations in DB)

nodes.label: AVS
nodes.description: Sulfide binding capacity for divalent metals (N=0 stations in DB -- expert prior only)

nodes.label: Grain Size
nodes.description: Proportion of fine sediment -- affects contaminant binding and habitat (N=32 stations in DB)

nodes.label: Metal Contamination
nodes.description: Combined metal contamination severity across all measured metals. Expert-elicited CPT (interim).

nodes.label: Organic Contamination
nodes.description: Combined organic contaminant severity (PAHs + PCBs). Expert-elicited CPT (interim).

nodes.label: Metal Bioavailability
nodes.description: Estimated bioavailable metal fraction after accounting for TOC/AVS binding. Expert-elicited CPT (interim).

nodes.label: Organic Bioavailability
nodes.description: Estimated bioavailable organic fraction after TOC partitioning. Expert-elicited CPT (interim).

nodes.label: Amphipod Toxicity
nodes.description: Predicted toxicity from bioavailable metals and organics (N=47 stations in DB). Expert-elicited CPT (interim).

nodes.label: Taxa Richness
nodes.description: Number of unique taxa (N=21 stations in DB). Expert-elicited CPT (interim).

nodes.label: Shannon Diversity
nodes.description: Shannon-Wiener diversity index H' (N=21 stations in DB). Expert-elicited CPT (interim).

nodes.label: Ecological Risk
nodes.description: Integrated ecological risk derived from causal pathway propagation through substance -> exposure -> effect chain. Expert-elicited CPT (interim).
